creator: exploringlondon
caption:
There’s a new @redken pop up in @bootsuk at @batterseapwrstn for 4 days only where you can get your hair dry styled for free! ad-pr

Celebrating their new Acidic Grow Full system, you can get free samples of the range, mini products as well as discounts if you buy more than 2 products! 

Perfect if you’re a Redken fan or you’re just discovering the brand!
🗓️ 28th-31st May
⏰ 11am-6pm daily, last appointment for dry styling is 5pm
📍 Boots Battersea Power Station @bootsbeautybattersea @redkenpro

transcription.text: There's a brand new pop-up in London and it's hidden inside the boots at Battersea Power Station. For four days only, Redken are celebrating their new acidic grow-fold system and you can get your hair styled for free by Redken stylists. You can also get your hands on free sachet samples and get free minis if you buy any Redken product. There are also discounts available if you buy two or more products. This is such a fun way to try the new range. Definitely pop in if you're around and find more details in the caption.
